persona.name: Mira
persona.summary: Cold-blooded interceptor who uses ice to win the banana race, not to brawl for its own sake.

personality.description: Hunt the carrier. Throw ice the moment it drops them faster than a chase. Grab a nearby cube whenever it sharpens the next banana stop.

notes: Prioritize the move that secures the banana or cleanly strips it from the carrier.
Choose ice over direct chase when it is the cleaner and faster stop.
